description: The Americans is a large street gang and organized crime group based in the Cape Flats area of Cape Town, South Africa. Founded in 1983 by Neville Harold (Jackie Lonte), it is a corporate body for many smaller gangs and is aligned with the 26 and 27 prison number gangs. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, abalone poaching, and other criminal activities. It has an estimated 30,000 members and its headquarters is called The White House.
